title: RoutingNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-routing-server-rs. Distributed VRP/TSP solver: a master fans out multi-start construction + local-search jobs, workers return tours, and the master tracks a live incumbent that streams to a canvas dashboard.

$dd:nats.summary: Distributed vehicle-routing/TSP solve jobs, worker tour results, and incumbent-improvement events.

subjects.name: RoutingJobs
subjects.description: Per-worker routing jobs. The master publishes one construction+local-search restart (a seeded nearest-neighbour or random start) for a problem; worker pods consume through the workers queue group and return an improved tour.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.routing.jobs

subjects.name: RoutingResults
subjects.description: Per-worker routing results. Workers publish a completed tour (or per-vehicle routes) with its total distance; the master keeps the global incumbent by solveId.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.routing.results

subjects.name: RoutingEvents
subjects.description: Incumbent-improvement and lifecycle events. The master emits a new event every time the best-known tour improves; the canvas dashboard renders these live.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.routing.events

queueGroups.name: RoutingWorkersQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by routing worker pods so each multi-start restart is solved exactly once.

streams.name: DD_REMOTE_ROUTING
streams.description: JetStream stream for distributed VRP/TSP solve jobs, worker tour results, and incumbent-improvement events.
